name: open-claude-remote
description: Remote control proxy for Claude Code CLI over LAN

scripts.dev: pnpm copy-frontend-dist && concurrently --kill-others --handle-input -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "pnpm --filter ./backend dev" "pnpm --filter ./frontend dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter ./shared build && pnpm --filter ./frontend build && pnpm --filter ./backend build && pnpm copy-frontend-dist
